task.domains: (topic task) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
task.title: 01-6-001 Align the mirrors of the printhead and curing carriage [Special Tests]

note.p: Use the following adjustment document for the best result : 01 How to adjust the alignment of the mirrors of the curing carriage and printhead carriage (used for matte print mode)

li.p: Activate SDS test: 01-6-001 Align mirrors on carriages for pin curing.
The printhead carriage and the curing carriage will move to the home position.
The printhead carriage is moved to the middle position (of the platen)
The curing carriage is moved to the current offset value for left hand side pin curing mirror.
Open the top cover and align the printhead and/or curing carriage.

note.p: Both carriages are allowed to be moved.
The software will track the absolute encoder difference.

li.p: Confirm the alignment in the SDS test.
The curing carriage is moved to the current offset value for right hand side pin curing mirror.
Open the top cover and align the printhead and/or curing carriage.

note.p: Both carriages are allowed to be moved.
The software will track the absolute encoder difference.

li.p: Confirm the alignment in the SDS test.
